abilities.name: Dont Mind Me (10)
abilities.description: If did not take offensive actions last turn, or first round and not acted, enemies targeting must succeed TN 10 Scrutiny or choose different target.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters/terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half.

abilities.name: Life Leech
abilities.description: Enemy characters beginning turn within a1 suffer 1 damage; character heals 1 damage.

abilities.name: Misery
abilities.description: When enemy within 6 yards fails Willpower duel, suffers 1 damage after resolving.

actions: (1) Doleful Grasp (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage. Mask Melancholy: Target gains Nobody Likes Me Condition until sunrise/sunset (- on Social duels, acts last in Dramatic Time).
(1) Doldrums (Prestidigitation) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 6 | Resist: Wp | Target becomes Slow. If already Slow, becomes Paralyzed.
system.notes: Physical manifestations of despondency. Attract and are attracted by depression. Sap spirit of opponents. Victims see little reason to resist. Feed on despair.
